steps.t: Orcs, goblins, trolls, and Orkish drums can be found at Rung-shakam. King Thráin has commanded you to join in the assault at Rung-shakam. You should a…
You have done much to hinder the Orcs and their vile allies at Rung-shakam. You should raise a banner of the Haban'akkâ of Thráin at Rung-shakam.
